title: Create focus-timer
description: Focus session timer with duration picker, praise-on-complete, and 5-window stats (24h/week/month/year/all). Logs to plan.
goal: Track focused work sessions from Telegram with duration selection, end-of-session praise, plan logging, and 5-window statistics.
evidence: Applied after integration with goal-checkin-notifier: duration picker on 'Начинаю', silent mid-session, praise on expiry, stats across 24h/week/month/year/all.
